data.reason: Original metric conflates different measurement scales without clear analytical value. CLTV (monetary value) and age (years) require separate analysis to maintain meaningful interpretation.

data.requirement: Focus linkages only between Customer_Info and Status_Analysis tables
data.reason: Service_Options connection spreads focus beyond initial demographic analysis goal. Keep primary analysis scope on demographic factors before introducing service variables in later stages

visualization.requirement: Replace box plots with grouped bar charts showing average churn scores by age/gender groups
visualization.reason: Box plots would disable interactive capabilities (as noted in constraints) and less intuitive for showing central tendencies across demographic groups

visualization.requirement: Modify heatmap to compare age bins vs dependents status with churn rates
visualization.reason: Original payment method focus deviated from demographic analysis goal. Dependents status is a core demographic variable requiring investigation
